steps.title: Match the pronoun
steps.content: The clause after the colon explains what dark fiction does. Since "dark fiction" is singular, the blank needs a singular pronoun that refers back to that genre.

steps.title: Reject wrong subjects
steps.content: Choice A uses "one," which refers to a generic person rather than dark fiction. Choice C uses plural "they." Choice D shifts the subject to "we," changing who uses horror tropes. The answer is B.
